items.headline: Humane Society of Scott County waives some adoption fees through July 26 due to space issues
items.summary: Due to space issues, the Humane Society of Scott County announced some adoption fees are being waived through July 26. According to a Facebook post from the Hum…

items.headline: 2 southeast Iowa men indicted for alleged multi-million-dollar Ponzi scheme
items.summary: The Ponzi scheme involved dozens of victims and millions of dollars lost, the U.S. Attorney's Office for the Southern District of Iowa said.

items.headline: Tennessee child abduction ends with non-custodial parent's arrest in Mt. Pleasant, Iowa
items.summary: The local police department learned that the suspect and child in the McMinn County, Tennessee, abduction were traveling on U.S. Highway 218.

items.headline: These 9 Illinois communities say they’re interested in new nuclear facilities
items.summary: The state lifted its moratorium on new nuclear facilities, but development could still be decades away.

items.headline: Bix 7 boosts tourism in Quad Cities, downtown Davenport
items.summary: The Quad-City Times Bix 7 brought an estimated $2.6 million impact last year, with tourism leaders expecting another boost for Quad Cities businesses.

items.headline: Parasite outbreak tied to lettuce expands to 9 states
items.summary: Illinois, Kansas, Oklahoma and Pennsylvania were newly linked to the outbreak as investigators continue tracing recalled shredded iceberg lettuce.

items.headline: Autism, veteran organizations to benefit at Backyard Classic in Bettendorf
items.summary: A series of sports competitions will be on deck Aug. 22, including tournaments in bags, wiffle ball and bucket golf. Cash prizes are offered in select activitie…

items.headline: Democrats select South Carolina for first primary in 2028; Iowa Dems lose first-in-nation status
items.summary: The decision Friday most likely cements a Democratic primary calendar that moves away from Iowa and New Hampshire in favor of more racially diverse states.

items.headline: Rock Island Arsenal Museum social media account to deactivate
items.summary: The Rock Island Arsenal Museum announced that its Facebook account will be deactivated by July 30.

items.headline: Hawkeyes announce details and date for 2026 Kids' Day at Kinnick

items.headline: 'Iowa has saved my life': Swedish man goes viral for falling in love with Iowa
items.summary: Filip Johansson graduated from school in London, moved back home to Sweden, then realized he wanted to live somewhere completely different: Iowa.
